Klasse PluginId

java.lang.Object
org.quurz.plugins.data.PluginId
Alle implementierten Schnittstellen:
Serializable, org.quurz.foomp.base.types.Eq<PluginId>
public class PluginId extends Object implements Serializable, org.quurz.foomp.base.types.Eq<PluginId>

Identifier for a plugin, uniquely defined by its group, name and version.

This class is immutable and serves as a key to distinguish different plugins and their specific versions within the system.

Seit:
1.0.0

  • Methodendetails

    • pluginId

      public static PluginId pluginId(@NonNull String group, @NonNull String name, @NonNull org.quurz.foomp.base.misc.SemVer version)

      Creates a new PluginId instance.

      Parameter:
      group - the non-null group of the plugin
      name - the non-null name of the plugin
      version - the non-null semantic version of the plugin
      Gibt zurück:
      a new PluginId instance
      Löst aus:
      NullPointerException - if group, name or version is null
      Seit:
      1.0.0

    • getGroup

      public String getGroup()

      Returns the group of the plugin.

      Gibt zurück:
      the non-null plugin group
      Seit:
      1.0.0

      public String getName()

      Returns the name of the plugin.

      Gibt zurück:
      the non-null plugin name
      Seit:

    • getVersion

      public org.quurz.foomp.base.misc.SemVer getVersion()

      Returns the semantic version of the plugin.

      Gibt zurück:
      the non-null plugin version
      Seit:
      1.0.0

    • eq

      public boolean eq(@NonNull PluginId other)

      Checks if this plugin identifier is equivalent to another one, considering only the group and the name.

      This method is useful when you want to check if two identifiers represent the same plugin, regardless of its specific version.

      Angegeben von:
      eq in Schnittstelle org.quurz.foomp.base.types.Eq<PluginId>
      Parameter:
      other - the other plugin identifier to compare with; must not be null
      Gibt zurück:
      true if both identifiers have the same group and name; false otherwise
      Löst aus:
      NullPointerException - if other is null
      Seit:
      1.0.0

    • equals

      public boolean equals(Object o)

      Compares this PluginId to another object for equality. Two PluginId instances are equal if their group, name and version are equal.

      Setzt außer Kraft:
      equals in Klasse Object
      Parameter:
      o - object to compare with
      Gibt zurück:
      true if the given object is an equal PluginId; false otherwise
      Seit:
      1.0.0

    • hashCode

      public int hashCode()

      Returns a hash code for this PluginId based on its group, name and version.

      Setzt außer Kraft:
      hashCode in Klasse Object
      Gibt zurück:
      computed hash code
      Seit:
      1.0.0

    • toString

      public String toString()

      Returns a string representation in the form PluginId[group=..., name=..., version=...].

      Setzt außer Kraft:
      toString in Klasse Object
      Gibt zurück:
      human-readable description of this PluginId
      Seit:
      1.0.0
